backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining user profiles, posts, comments, chat, study groups, reports, storage mixins, and validation utilities including a 600MB video size limit.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking feature IDs to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text listing short descriptions of various frontend files and their roles in the application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining light/dark theme color variables using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point initializing the root element and loading the main React script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component handling theme, navigation, authentication, and lazy-loaded page rendering.
frontend/src/components/FeedPostCard.tsx: Post card component handling post display, media rendering, profile lookups, likes, comments, and guest fallbacks.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer with attribution, caffeine.ai link, and developer credit.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component handling navigation, authentication, and user/admin state with dropdowns and status-aware UI.
frontend/src/components/PostComposer.tsx: Post creation form supporting text, images, videos, and documents with validation, previews, and upload handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for creating a user profile with name, email, and academic details using a form and mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor based on identity, refetching dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication, status, and stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks wrapping backend actor methods for profiles, posts, comments, likes, and feed management.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base setup defining light/dark theme variables and global styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Provides a UI to select contacts and send messages using queries, with basic validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Fetches and displays a sorted feed of posts with like and comment actions, handling loading and user identity.
frontend/src/pages/ForumPage.tsx: Allows users to create new forum posts via a modal dialog and displays a placeholder when no posts exist.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home landing page showing features, login actions, and profile creation prompts with identity integration.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationPage.tsx: Moderation dashboard that lists and filters reports, shows user stats, and allows reviewing or resolving reports.
frontend/src/pages/StudyGroupsPage.tsx: Enables authenticated users to create study groups via a modal, validating identity and actor readiness.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Parses various IC-related error formats to extract a readable message, falling back to generic text when needed.
frontend/src/utils/mediaGuards.ts: Provides validators and safe-access helpers for post media (video, image, document) including type checks, size constants, and URL extraction.
frontend/src/utils/principal.ts: Safely converts a string into a Dfinity Principal instance, returning null on invalid input.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Handles reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/src/utils/userDisplay.ts: Generates user initials and provides a fallback label for unknown users.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom themes, colors, animations, and plugins like typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Stores the project’s high-level state, architecture notes, and known issues for the ICSE Crowd ICP dapp.
